calendar.igEditNotSupported: Instagram does not allow editing captions of published posts. If you want to change the text, you must delete the post in Postio and publish it again.
calendar.saveMetadataTooltip: Saves only internal metadata (internal tags, inline hashtags, location). The text and media on social networks stay unchanged.
calendar.metadataOnlyHint: The post text is unchanged – only internal metadata is saved; nothing is re-published.
calendar.newPostHint: To save a post, you must enter text and pick at least one platform. Internal tags are saved together with the post.

calendar.instagramVideoTooSmallHint: Instagram does not support videos with low resolution (minimum 640 × 1138 px). Please regenerate the video at a higher resolution (recommended 1080 × 1920 px).

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDescription: Manage your personal information and preferences.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Deleting your account is irreversible. All your data will be permanently removed.
settings.preferencesDescription: Set your timezone, time format, and other preferences.
settings.timezoneDescription: Used as the default timezone for new connected channels and for sending email notifications. Also used for calculating your posting streaks.
settings.timeFormatDescription: Set the time format for the Calendar and Queue.
settings.startOfWEEKDescription: Set the first day of the week for the Calendar, date picker, and your posting streaks.
settings.defaultPostingActionDescription: Set a default time to post for the composer. We will use it whenever the composer is triggered without a specific time.
settings.photoDescription: Choose a photo that is at least 180x180 pixels in size.
settings.twoFactorAuthDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account. You'll need an authentication code from an app like Google Authenticator when logging in.
settings.setup2FAStep1: 1. Open Google Authenticator or a similar app
settings.setup2FAStep2: 2. Scan the QR code or enter the secret code manually
settings.setup2FAStep3: 3. Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm
settings.qrCodeInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
settings.recoveryCodesDescription: You can use these codes to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app. Save them in a secure place.
settings.recoveryCodesWarning: These codes will only be shown once!
settings.iHaveSavedCodes: I have saved my recovery codes

cookie.usesCookies: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on Postio.
cookie.preferencesIntro: Choose which types of cookies you would like to enable.
cookie.necessaryDesc: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be switched off.
cookie.functionalDesc: These cookies allow us to remember your choices (e.g. language) for a better experience.
cookie.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
cookie.advertisingDesc: These cookies are used to make advertising more relevant and less repetitive.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use Postio.
privacy.dataWeCollectDesc: When you register and use our service, we collect data such as your name, email address, and service usage data.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: We use your data to provide, maintain, and improve our service, including personalizing your experience and communicating with you.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Information about how we use cookies can be found in our cookie management panel at the bottom of the screen. These files help us ensure security and the best user experience.
privacy.dataSharingDesc: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We share it only to provide the service or when required by law.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also withdraw your cookie consent at any time.
privacy.dataDeletionDesc: In Postio, you have full control over your data. If you wish to delete your account and all related data (including connected social accounts), you can do so directly in the app under Settings -> Danger Zone -> Delete Account. Alternatively, you can send a deletion request to postio.cz@gmail.com. Your data will be permanently removed from our servers within 30 days of your request.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have questions about this policy, contact us at

inbox.comingSoon: Messages and comments from all your platforms in one place. We're preparing it for you – coming soon!

billing.creator: Creator

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your profile in a few steps

onboarding.step3Message: Your profile is set up. You can now plan posts, connect accounts, and grow on social media.

tags.title: Tags
tags.emptySubtitle: Tags are visible to everyone in your organization.
tags.emptyDescription: No tags yet. Create tags to organize and categorize your social media content. Tags help you track campaigns and analyze the performance of your posts.
tags.tagNameExists: A tag with this name already exists
tags.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? This action cannot be undone.
tags.infoBannerText: Tags are visible to everyone in your organization.
tags.infoDialogIntro: A short readme on what tags are, why they matter, and how to get the most out of them in Postio.
tags.infoDialogWhatBody: Tags are internal labels you attach to your posts. You create them yourself and name them after whatever matters to you – a campaign, an audience, a funnel stage, or a topic.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem1: Quick filtering – instantly find posts by category in Posts and Calendar.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem2: Better overview – see at a glance how many posts use each tag in the Labels list.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem3: Ready for analytics – tags will power your content performance breakdowns.
tags.infoDialogWhyItem4: Consistent team – if you collaborate, tags align how everyone labels content.
tags.infoDialogHowItem1: Create tags in Settings → Labels using the Create tag button.
tags.infoDialogHowItem2: Attach them to posts when creating or editing a post.
tags.infoDialogHowItem3: Filter Posts or Calendar by a specific tag.
tags.infoDialogHowItem4: Track post counts per tag in Settings → Labels.
tags.infoDialogVisibilityBody: Tags are an internal tool only. Your followers on social networks never see them – they help you organize content for yourself.
